training.notes: Original fine-tune script uses Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct as the base model.

serving.notes: Temporary serving model selected from locally installed Ollama models for Thai conversational quality. Replace with merged fine-tuned custom model later if required.

deployment_notes.future_upgrade_path: Merge LoRA with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, export GGUF, and replace the temporary Ollama chat model when the fine-tuned model is ready.
